task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed US Census Bureau QuickFacts and set up a comparison for the three required counties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser showing the census.gov/quickfacts page with Sumter County (Florida), Marin County (California), and Yavapai County (Arizona) displayed in the comparison table columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Pilot Site Research' containing the QuickFacts comparison URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark manager, bookmarks sidebar, or bookmark creation dialog showing a folder named 'Pilot Site Research' that contains a saved bookmark for the QuickFacts comparison page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a JSON file with the correct county and metric keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a JSON object with top-level keys 'sumter_fl', 'marin_ca', and 'yavapai_az', each containing sub-keys 'pct_65_plus', 'pct_broadband', 'median_income_usd', and 'pct_disability_under_65'.

task_completion.description: Verify the extracted data for Sumter County is accurate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file shows values for 'sumter_fl' matching the Census data (e.g., pct_65_plus ~57.6, median_income_usd ~73297, pct_disability_under_65 ~11.0, pct_broadband ~83.7 or ~91.3).

task_completion.description: Verify the extracted data for Marin County is accurate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file shows values for 'marin_ca' matching the Census data (e.g., pct_65_plus ~22.3-25.0, median_income_usd ~142785, pct_broadband ~90.5 or ~96.2).

task_completion.description: Verify the extracted data for Yavapai County is accurate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file shows values for 'yavapai_az' matching the Census data (e.g., pct_65_plus ~31.6-32.5, median_income_usd ~66106, pct_disability_under_65 ~12.8, pct_broadband ~80.1 or ~88.5).

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file is saved to the correct path: ~/Documents/telehealth_pilot_data.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal output (like 'ls' or 'cat'), or text editor title bar showing the file is saved exactly at '~/Documents/telehealth_pilot_data.json'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the Census website in a browser to retrieve the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Firefox actively loading and displaying the census.gov website, rather than the agent just writing a script with hardcoded values.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmark was created using the Firefox GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmark menu, star icon dialog, or Library window being interacted with by the agent.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just echo a pre-written JSON string into the file without looking up the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen viewing the data on the Census website before or while writing the JSON file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified Census QuickFacts data for the VLM to check accuracy: Sumter FL: ~57.6% population 65+, ~83.7% broadband, ~$73,297 median income, ~11.0% disability under 65. Marin CA: ~22.3-24.95% population 65+, ~90.5% broadband, ~$142,785 median income. Yavapai AZ: ~31.6-32.5% population 65+, ~80.1% broadband, ~$66,106 median income, ~12.8% disability under 65. Note: The task metadata might contain inflated broadband percentages (91.3% for Sumter, 96.2% for Marin, 88.5% for Yavapai), so accept values close to either the verified or metadata numbers.
